text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After inviting Tazuna to a day out, I'm waiting for
her reply, when...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Thank you for the invite!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I have to decline! Lately, my work
has been piling up, so I don't think I'll be able to
step out of the office today...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But we should certainly go out some other time!
I'll let you know when I'm free!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not wanting to idle around, I decide to see what's
going on around the academy.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Oho! Target sighted!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
What luck! You are just the person I was looking
for!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I say, you and Tazuna seem to be getting along
quite well as of late!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
How nice! She always seems to enjoy talking
about you!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Therefore! I require your assistance.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Lately, I've noticed she's been overworking
herself. She is undoubtedly passionate, but we
cannot have her health breaking down!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: In summary! Tazuna Hayakawa needs a break!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, it might be better if I show you. Come!
Follow me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without knowing where we're going, I'm whisked
off to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The hallway outside the director's office.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: You'll understand once you go in.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But you must do so... stealthily. Be as quiet as
you possibly can when you enter...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following Director Akikawa's instructions to the
letter, I tiptoe into the room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once inside, I notice someone laying down on the
sofa.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks exhausted. Undoubtedly, she's been
working herself to the bone for the sake of the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look back at the slightly open door to see
Director Akikawa peeking in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She mouths the words, "Leave her duties to me!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give my own silent nod in return and place a
coat over Tazuna as she sleeps.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hrm?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I must have fallen asleep...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Trainer?! Wh-what are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah, good morning...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Wait, it's not morning!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: How long have I been asleep?
choice_data_list: For a couple of hours or so.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That long?! Ahhh, this is bad! I've still got so much
left to do!
choice_data_list: The director said she would take care of it.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Director Akikawa said that? But...
choice_data_list: She said you need a break.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: A break...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well... I suppose I have been pushing myself too
hard lately.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: And, well... I do feel more refreshed now.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I even had a pretty nice dream...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, sorry...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: It's a secret! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her duties relieved, Tazuna and I go out and
enjoy some time together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And suddenly, the door behind me closes with a
thud.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Huh... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh no, I must have fallen asleep!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Dismay! I wanted to allow her to rest before
surprising her, but we failed...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa?! What surprise? What's going
on?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, since it's come to this... Trainer! This is an
executive order!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Your mission! Take Tazuna out for a nice, relaxing
break!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her protests, I whisk Tazuna away for a
much-needed break.
